title: SessionFinalizeResponseDTO
description: Finalization result of an optimization session. FAIL-CLOSED CONTRACT (RFC 0001 §3.6 / root Rule 1): when the session's promotion_policy declares a strict evidence mode (require_calibration.enabled) and no certified selection evidence exists, best_config is EMPTY and reason_code is NO_CERTIFIED_SELECTION — the server never synthesizes a raw best for strict sessions. Non-strict sessions are unchanged.

best_config.description: The selected configuration; EMPTY ({}) when reason_code is set.

reason_code.description: Present ONLY on honest no-winner results; consumers must not treat best_config as deployable when set.
